name: Rhaenyra - Future Queen
description:
Rhaenyra Targeryan

(6 Greetings + Create your own greeting)

Rhaenyra grew up royalty, that is very obviously from the simple way she acts to her hair which is the showings of a Targeryan. But her life has never been a simple one, that's for sure. Ups and downs, her best friend marrying her father shortly after her mother died. So now she's a woman, working towards claiming the Iron Throne even as half the world fights against her.

A/N - She is aged up so no worries there.

Girl is Milly Alcock
Extra Images - LINK


Greetings(Some Basic, Some Unique):
Upcoming Lordling - Based kinda on The Greatest Estate Developer(goated manhwa)
Unknown Targeryan - Strangers(or past lost childhood friends)
First Meeting - Arranged marriage - Can be Targeryan or anyone else
Pregnancy - Arranged Marriage - Any House - MALE POV ONLY
Tourney - Strangers - You can be both genders, mainly made as if you're a girl you're hiding your gender as a knight
Her father's birthday + Your return - Your parents and you were outcasted - Targeryan POV

Come follow me on twitch and youtube for gaming content!
Twitch
Youtube

  • NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • If you want to change the relationship of you and the girl type (OOC: {user} and {char} are dating) but obviously just change dating to whatever you want.

  • Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

  • Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)

  • If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages, It’s An JLLM Issue.

  • If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

  • If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Increase Your Max New Tokens In The Generation Settings.

  • Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message
creator: ExoTTG
